agendaItems.title:
File No. E2025-8 CH 1
Discussion on the framework for a resolution to establish the goals and objectives/scope for the City of Tampa Charter Review Advisory Commission in recommending amendments to the City Charter, and guidelines for membership and the conduct of its meetings including a tentative timeline with steps necessary for Charter amendment language for voter consideration on the March 2, 2027, municipal election ballot. (Original motion initiated by Carlson-Maniscalco on October 23, 2025)
